name: Snowflake
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the database and basic metadata extraction of schemas and tables.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can properly reach the database and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to snowflake, please validate the credentials

steps.name: GetDatabases
steps.description: List all the available databases to the user. If all databases option is selected, we will try to go beyond the configured database.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch databases, please validate if the user has enough privilege to fetch databases.

steps.name: GetSchemas
steps.description: List all the schemas available to the user.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch schemas, please validate if the user has enough privilege to fetch schemas.

steps.name: GetTables
steps.description: From a given schema, list the tables belonging to that schema. If no schema is specified, we'll list the tables of a random schema.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch tables, please validate if the user has enough privilege to fetch tables.

steps.name: GetViews
steps.description: From a given schema, list the views belonging to that schema. If no schema is specified, we'll list the tables of a random schema.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch views, please validate if the user has enough privilege to fetch views.

steps.name: GetStreams
steps.description: From a given schema, list the streams belonging to that schema. If no schema is specified, we'll list the streams of a random schema.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch streams, please validate if the user has enough privilege to fetch streams.

steps.name: GetTags
steps.description: Check if we can access the snowflake.account_usage.tag_references table to list all available tags.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch tags, please validate if the user has at least select privileges for snowflake.account_usage.tag_references table.

steps.name: GetQueries
steps.description: Check if we can access the snowflake.account_usage.query_history table to get query logs. These queries power the usage workflow and the legacy lineage parser path.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch queries, please validate if user has select privilege for table snowflake.account_usage.query_history to get query logs.

steps.name: GetAccessHistory
steps.description: Check if we can access the snowflake.account_usage.access_history table, which is the default source for the lineage workflow (table & column lineage computed by Snowflake). Requires Enterprise edition and IMPORTED PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE SNOWFLAKE; if unavailable, lineage automatically falls back to the query_history parser path.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch access history, please validate the account is Enterprise+ and the role has IMPORTED PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE SNOWFLAKE (select privilege on snowflake.account_usage.access_history). Lineage will fall back to the query_history parser if this is unavailable.
